items.title: Watch Madonna, the Muppets, and More Perform at 2026 World Cup Final Halftime
items.summary: The 11-minute spectacle included performances by Shakira, Justin Bieber, BTS, Burna Boy, and Coldplay’s Chris Martin

items.title: L7 Bassist Jennifer Finch Dies at 59
items.summary: The grunge musician died on Saturday after being diagnosed with an aggressive form of brain cancer

items.title: Tinashe Announces New Album Popstar
items.summary: A crunk-inflected single, “Crash Out,” follows last month’s “Too Easy”

items.title: Dave Kendall, Creator of MTV’s 120 Minutes, Dies at 63
items.summary: The creator and long-running host of the influential show helped spearhead alt-rock’s mainstream explosion
